content.requirement: Marketing email templates must include functional unsubscribe mechanism
compareSteps: Scan marketing template files for unsubscribe link or List-Unsubscribe header config
Flag transactional templates that include promotional CTAs (LEG-EMAIL-004 advisory)
Verify Resend send calls for marketing type include list-unsubscribe headers
content.remediationDirective: Add visible unsubscribe link in footer; configure List-Unsubscribe header via Resend API for marketing sends.
